title: Top Finance & Commerce College in Noida – Galgotias
content: Funded Projects Publication WOS/Scopus Student Publication Patent Published/Granted School of Finance and Commerce provides comprehensive programs in the fields of Commerce and Finance that have an interdisciplinary focus and are rigorous and intensive. The school employs a variety of teaching methods, such as lectures, case studies, role plays, group discussions, and seminars. The faculty members are proficient, and the state-of-the-art infrastructure provides an excellent learning platform. Additionally, the department hosts interactive sessions with prominent industry leaders, which contribute to the overall development of students. The programs are ideal for students who aspire to pursue careers in Commerce, Auditing, Financial Reporting, Accounting, Corporate Finance, Financial Planning, Financial Markets, Risk Management, Banking, and Insurance. Every year, prominent companies such as Infosys, NIIT, Vodafone, Aditya Birla Group, BMW, Airtel, Citibank, and HCL recruit students from the department. The Finance courses aim to introduce students to institutions, theories, and practices in Management and Leadership. They are designed to prepare students for a career in Financial Markets and Services. B.COM (Financial Markets) includes certification courses from the National Stock Exchange (NSE) Academy and provides in-depth knowledge of financial securities markets such as bonds, stocks, and commodities. The course equips students with knowledge of financial assets pricing, trading regulations, costs and fees in transactions, and market forces determining the pricing of securities. The value of the four-year degree lies in the fourth year, where students can add to their "degree with research." Under the provisions of the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020, the undergraduate degrees will be credit-based and available for digital storage. Students can drop out at different stages and re-enter the higher education system. The credits earned so far will be accounted for. The NEP 2020 provides a flexible study route in the higher education sector, allowing students to choose their academic journey with multiple entry and exit options. The four-year undergraduate degree encourages research-based learning and is similar to the higher education structure abroad. Program: B.Pharm Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business UP Government University Grants Commission All India Council for Technical Education The Bar Council of India Indian Nursing Council National Council for Teacher Education. Pharmacy Council of India The Indian Association of Physiotherapists Association of Indian Universities Galgotias University accredited by NAAC with the A+ Embrace the Opportunities of Our Dynamic Sports and Extracurricular Scene Take your Game to the Next Level with our Top-Notch Sports Infrastructure YASH AGRAWAL Founder | ASL Edutech LLPI completed my post graduation from School of Finance & Commerce at Galgotias University. College life is special in everyone’s life. The journey at SFC holds special place in my heart. It has given us a launching pad for lifetime. I was passionate for starting a company of my own. The university promotes entrepreneurial culture and organizes many platforms to meet founders and business leaders. Galgotias University provided me roots to follow my dream of having my own Start Up. I owe gratitude to my Alma Mater for enabling each one of us to be believe that we are special and preparing us to embrace the ever evolving global challenges. I would just like to say that have faith in your abilities and never lose hope. It’s never too late AAYUSHI AGRAWAL Deputy Manager | ICICI Bank LtdThe academic experience with an excellent infrastructure and excellent faculty at Galgotias University has endowed me with a lifelong career excellence. The exceptional programme and teaching methodologies backed by practical skills and industry interface have given me the confidence to pursue my career ahead. The University organizes various industrial visits, guest lectures, conferences and case conclaves to give a hands-on experience to its students. The all-time support and motivation of the faculty members has enlightened me throughout the beautiful journey. University has been a great contributor towards the development of my personality. By participating in the inter-university and intra-university events conducted by the School of Finance And Commerce, I have established my leadership, time management and team management skills. I truly cherish my college memories and enriching experiences it provided me. SALONI JAIN Financial Data Associate | Moody’s Investors ServiceAs they say, “ Well begun is half done” Being a part of new beginnings is always special and so is my journey in Corporate world as it kicked off along with Galgotias University’s batch of MBA Financial Management. Looking back, I can certainly say that Galgotias was the most important milestone in shaping my career. MBA Financial Management provides an innovative course design, best in class faculty from industry and hands on experience from various training (especially Industry Internship). Throughout the academic sessions, I was challenged to discover capabilities that I never knew I had. Along with academics, the University focuses on personality development which helped me build a rewarding career. AFREEN KHANAM Equity Research Associate | EvaluserveI feel proud and thankful to be a part of School Of Finance & Commerce, Galgotias University. My department encouraged me to explore my talent & potential by providing an exceptionally integrated and holistic learning environment. Initially I was an introverted students. I am really grateful to my teachers who constantly motivated me to work on my soft skills and taught me the value of emotional intelligence in today’s job scenario. Along with academics I participated in extra curricular activities which gave me confident in facing job interviews. I express my heartfelt thanks to the institution for giving me the perfect opportunity to explore myself and laying the foundation of my career. Ritu Gupta MBA ( Financial Management ) 2021-2023Time flies especially when you have a great time. It feels like yesterday when I had entered the gates of this university. With gleaming eyes and a heart filled with hopes, I took admission in MBA(FM) in School of Finance And Commerce. And luckily, the institution did not let me down. Currently I am in last semester and past months have brought a lot of changes in my personality. The best part of being an SFC student is that along with exposure to best pedagogy , it provides practical experiences. It has equipped me to deal with any challenges in my lifetime. I feel grateful to be a part of school of finance and commerce in Galgotias. The teachers have helped me immensely in shaping my future. As a part of GCS and CPDD my skills have been upgraded. I am now placed in Deloitte and this all was possible due to collective efforts of me and me mentors here in School of Finance and Commerce Akshita Garg 2020-23I am delighted to be a part of School of Finance And Commerce, which offers value based and innovative education in field of Finance and Commerce in Galgotias University. Being part of SFC is one of the best experiences of my life. My department leaves no stone unturned to shape one's future. Huge respect, love and devotion to entire team of faculty members. It's their efforts that make me count myself into one of the best students of my batch. Its due to their relentless efforts in enhancing the knowledge, skills and attitude that I got placed in E &Y as an Analyst. I can’t thank them enough for giving me such a good career start in a dream company. Mangalam Tiwari 2021-2023I enrolled in SFC in July 2021 to pursue my MBA in Financial Management. I feel lucky to be a part of SFC. The school has interdisciplinary focus and are curriculum is very intensive and rigorous . What sets Galgotias University apart from others is that innovative and effective methods are used for teaching learning experience. Multiple methods including lectures, case studies, role plays, group discussions and seminars are used to enhance engagement. The state-of-the-art infrastructure along with the expertise of our proficient faculty members provides a platform for top-notch learning Along with this faculties do not hesitate to show offer support for mental well being of students. They always help whenever I have needed anything. I feel in this age of technology where any information is available at the click of a button, its equally important to cater to our emotional and mental well being. Vikash Rai 2021-24A good institution can give you an edge in your life over others. I am grateful to be a part of such esteemed University which focuses on building a culture of lifelong learning and innovation. As a student of BBA (FIA), I learned conceptual, practical and analytical skills for financial as well as investment decision-making. Along with academics, School of Finance And Commerce has been a great contributor to the development of my personality. I have established my leadership, time management, and team skills. My teachers are the best part of my college life. They are always ready to help and support the students.. Our department conducted various activities every month. As part of GCS member, I have organized a lot of events like freshers, induction, orientation and a number of other events.
